__comment__: ILLUSTRATIVE EXAMPLE of the wood-30 woodshed-config contract — NOT a live config. The app NEVER fetches this file (only a file literally named 'woodshed-config.json' is read). To go live: copy to woodshed-config.json, set 'auto' to false, and pin the fields you want. Validates against WOODSHED-CONFIG-SCHEMA.md. As shipped here, auto:true => the app is fully date-driven and every 'config' field is ignored (safe no-op); rangeTop default 21 = A5 (the wood-37 fixed target).
